title: Inventory Save And Config Modules
summary: Current-state inventory of source-only metadata for the five committed src/save/ TypeScript modules and the one committed src/bootstrap/config.ts TypeScript module that together model the vanilla DOOM 1.9 save/load/config surface: P_ArchivePlayers/P_ArchiveWorld/P_ArchiveThinkers core serialization (player, mobj, world layout records and SAVEGAME_*_SIZE byte spans), P_ArchiveSpecials specials thinker serialization (tc_ceiling/tc_door/tc_floor/tc_plat/tc_flash/tc_strobe/tc_glow/tc_endspecials class enumeration with snapshot sizes), G_DoLoadGame top-level loadgame chain that walks header→players→world→mobjs→specials→EOF, G_DoSaveGame savegame header (SAVEGAME_DESCRIPTION_SIZE=24, SAVEGAME_VERSION_CODE=109, SAVEGAME_VERSION_TEXT, SAVEGAME_LEVELTIME_SIZE=3, gameepisode/gamemap/gameskill/playeringame/leveltime fields), the vanilla SAVEGAMESIZE=0x2c000 size limit and the canonical Doom section concatenation order (header→players→world→mobjs→specials→EOF), and the M_LoadDefaults disjoint default.cfg+chocolate-doom.cfg precedence loader with -config/-extraconfig command-line overrides, without embedding proprietary WAD bytes or raw configuration file contents.
evidence_method: inventory lane local repository audit using git ls-files-compatible Bun.Glob scans, sha256sum-equivalent SHA-256 fingerprints, src/save/, src/bootstrap/config.ts, test/save/, test/bootstrap/config-precedence.test.ts, reference/manifests/vanilla-limit-summary.json, reference/manifests/source-catalog.json Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 anchors, and package.json Bun script context.

modules.role: Implements the M_LoadDefaults disjoint two-file config loader with VANILLA_CONFIG_FILENAME='default.cfg' and EXTENDED_CONFIG_FILENAME='chocolate-doom.cfg' filename constants, the ConfigValueType (float|integer|string) type discriminator that mirrors Chocolate Doom's DEFAULT_INT/DEFAULT_STRING/DEFAULT_FLOAT, the ConfigDefinition{name,type,defaultValue} variable record, the ConfigLoadResult{values,vanillaConfigPath,extendedConfigPath,vanillaLoaded,extendedLoaded} merged precedence record, the parseConfigValue per-type parser (decimal or 0x-hex integer, double-quote-stripped string, parseFloat), the parseConfigFileContent name<whitespace>value line parser that silently ignores unknown variable names and malformed lines, the buildDefinitionMap/initializeDefaults definition-array helpers, the resolveVanillaConfigPath/resolveExtendedConfigPath -config and -extraconfig CommandLine override resolvers, and the loadDefaults async pipeline that applies the canonical defaults→default.cfg→chocolate-doom.cfg precedence over a single Map<string, number|string> values bucket and reports per-file loaded flags.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 m_config.c M_LoadDefaults two-file disjoint-namespace config loader with the -config and -extraconfig command-line overrides, the DEFAULT_INT/DEFAULT_STRING/DEFAULT_FLOAT typed default table, and the silent unknown-variable ignore behavior; the d_main.c command-line plumbing that hands -config/-extraconfig override paths to M_LoadDefaults at startup is anchored by the source catalog as Chocolate Doom src/doom/d_main.c.

modules.role: Defines the canonical SAVEGAME_*_SIZE byte spans (SAVEGAME_MOBJ_SIZE=154, SAVEGAME_PLAYER_SIZE=280, SAVEGAME_PSPRITE_SIZE=16, SAVEGAME_SECTOR_SIZE=14, SAVEGAME_SIDE_SIZE=10, SAVEGAME_LINE_BASE_SIZE=6, SAVEGAME_MAPTHING_SIZE=10, SAVEGAME_TICCMD_SIZE=8) that mirror the on-disk vanilla savegame record sizes, the SAVEGAME_ALIGNMENT=4 longword padding, the SAVEGAME_AMMO_COUNT=4/CARD_COUNT=6/FRAG_COUNT=4/POWER_COUNT=6/PSPRITE_COUNT=2/WEAPON_COUNT=9/PLAYER_COUNT=4 player-array cardinalities, the SAVEGAME_THINKER_CLASS_END=0/MOBJ=1 thinker-class enumeration boundary, the SaveGamePlayer/SaveGameMobj/SaveGameSector/SaveGameSide/SaveGameLine/SaveGamePsprite/SaveGameTiccmd/SaveGameMapThing/SaveGameThinker/SaveGameWorld/SaveGameWorldLayout/SaveGameWorldLineLayout/SaveGamePlayerArchive interfaces and SaveGamePlayerPresence/SaveGamePlayerSlots/SaveGameSidePair/SaveGameSidenumPair tuple types, and the readArchivedPlayers/readArchivedMobjs/readArchivedWorld/writeArchivedPlayers/writeArchivedMobjs/writeArchivedWorld primitive readers and writers that walk the canonical SAVEGAME_*_SIZE byte spans into typed records and back.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_saveg.c P_ArchivePlayers, P_UnArchivePlayers, P_ArchiveWorld, P_UnArchiveWorld, P_ArchiveThinkers, P_UnArchiveThinkers serialization with the per-record byte spans documented by the DoomWiki Savegame format reference and the doomdef.h MAXPLAYERS=4 player-array cardinality.

modules.role: Implements the G_DoLoadGame top-level read pipeline with SAVEGAME_EOF=0x1d EOF-marker constant, the LoadGameLayout{worldLayout} bridge to the per-map sector/side/line counts, the LoadGameRestore{header,playerArchive,world,mobjs,specials} restored-section bundle, and the readLoadGame chain that walks the canonical Doom section order (header→players→world→mobjs→specials→EOF) by delegating to readSaveGameHeader/readArchivedPlayers/readArchivedWorld/readArchivedMobjs/readArchivedSpecials and verifies the trailing SAVEGAME_EOF byte before returning a SaveGameReadResult<LoadGameRestore>.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 g_game.c G_DoLoadGame top-level savegame read state machine that loads the SAVE_GAME_TERMINATOR=0x1d EOF-terminated section bundle in the canonical order header→players→world→mobjs→specials and the doomdef.h SAVE_GAME_TERMINATOR EOF byte.

modules.role: Implements the G_DoSaveGame header writer and reader with SAVEGAME_DESCRIPTION_SIZE=24 (SAVESTRINGSIZE), SAVEGAME_VERSION_SIZE=16 fixed-width version field, SAVEGAME_VERSION_CODE=109 (vanilla 'version 109' magic), SAVEGAME_VERSION_TEXT='version 109', SAVEGAME_PLAYER_COUNT=4 (MAXPLAYERS), SAVEGAME_LEVELTIME_SIZE=3 three-byte big-endian leveltime field, and the derived SAVEGAME_HEADER_SIZE = 24 + 16 + 3 + 4 + 3 = 50 byte header, the SaveGameHeader{description,gameepisode,gamemap,gameskill,leveltime,playeringame} record with SaveGamePlayerPresence player-tuple, the writeSaveGameHeader fixed-width string padder for description and version, and the readSaveGameHeader byte-for-byte parser that returns null on a wrong version field or short buffer.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 g_game.c G_DoSaveGame and G_DoLoadGame savegame header section (description string, 'version 109' magic, gameskill, gameepisode, gamemap, playeringame array, leveltime three-byte big-endian) and the doomdef.h SAVESTRINGSIZE=24 description-string limit and MAXPLAYERS=4 player-array cardinality.

modules.role: Implements the P_ArchiveSpecials/P_UnArchiveSpecials specials thinker serialization with the SAVEGAME_SPECIAL_THINKER_CLASS_CEILING=0/DOOR=1/FLOOR=2/PLAT=3/FLASH=4/STROBE=5/GLOW=6/END=7 (tc_ceiling..tc_endspecials) thinker-class enumeration, the SAVEGAME_SPECIAL_THINKER_SIZE=12 base thinker prefix, the per-class SAVEGAME_SPECIAL_DOOR_SIZE=40, FLOOR_SIZE=42, FLASH_SIZE=36, STROBE_SIZE=36, GLOW_SIZE=28, REFERENCE_SIZE=4 byte spans, the SAVEGAME_SPECIAL_ACTIVE_PLAT_SNAPSHOT_SIZE=48 and SAVEGAME_SPECIAL_ACTIVE_CEILING_SNAPSHOT_SIZE=40 active-thinker scratch records with SAVEGAME_SPECIAL_ACTIVE_PLAT_COUNT=MAXPLATS=30 and SAVEGAME_SPECIAL_ACTIVE_CEILING_COUNT=MAXCEILINGS=30 cardinalities, the SAVEGAME_SPECIAL_BUTTON_COUNT=MAXBUTTONS=16 / SAVEGAME_SPECIAL_BUTTON_SNAPSHOT_SIZE=24 button table, the SaveGameSpecialDoor/Floor/Plat/Ceiling/Flash/Strobe/Glow record interfaces with SaveGameSpecialThinker discriminated union, and the readArchivedSpecials/writeArchivedSpecials class-byte-prefixed serializer that terminates on tc_endspecials.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_saveg.c P_ArchiveSpecials and P_UnArchiveSpecials thinker-class-tagged serialization (tc_ceiling=0, tc_door=1, tc_floor=2, tc_plat=3, tc_flash=4, tc_strobe=5, tc_glow=6, tc_endspecials=7) plus the activeceilings/activeplats/buttonlist scratch tables and the MAXCEILINGS=30, MAXPLATS=30, MAXBUTTONS=16 vanilla active-thinker caps from p_ceilng.c/p_plats.c/p_spec.c.

modules.role: Enforces the vanilla SAVEGAMESIZE=0x2c000 (180224 bytes) save buffer size limit with VANILLA_SAVEGAME_LIMIT_SIZE=0x2c000 constant and the canonical 'Savegame buffer overrun' I_Error string in VANILLA_SAVEGAME_OVERRUN_ERROR, the assertVanillaSaveGameByteLength gate that throws RangeError(VANILLA_SAVEGAME_OVERRUN_ERROR) when the final byte length exceeds the cap, the boolean-or-integer vanilla-compatibility flag (matching Doom's vanilla_savegame_limit cvar), the VanillaSaveGameSections{header,mobjs,players,specials,world} pre-serialized section record, and the writeVanillaSaveGame contiguous-buffer assembler that concatenates header→players→world→mobjs→specials→SAVEGAME_EOF=0x1d in the canonical Doom section order and asserts the size cap after appending the EOF marker.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 g_game.c SAVEGAMESIZE=0x2c000 (180224-byte) savegame buffer cap and the canonical Doom section order (header→players→world→mobjs→specials→SAVE_GAME_TERMINATOR=0x1d) used by G_DoSaveGame.

test_coverage.notes: test/save/ covers the SAVEGAME_*_SIZE byte spans and the readArchived/writeArchived players/mobjs/world primitives under core-serialization.test.ts, the G_DoLoadGame top-level header→players→world→mobjs→specials→EOF chain under loadgame.test.ts, the SAVEGAME_DESCRIPTION_SIZE=24/SAVEGAME_VERSION_CODE=109 header writer/reader and SaveGameHeader{gameepisode,gamemap,gameskill,leveltime,playeringame} record under save-header.test.ts, the tc_ceiling..tc_endspecials thinker-class-tagged P_ArchiveSpecials/P_UnArchiveSpecials specials serializer under special-serialization.test.ts, and the SAVEGAMESIZE=0x2c000 size limit enforcement plus the canonical header→players→world→mobjs→specials→EOF section concatenation under vanilla-limits.test.ts. The default.cfg+chocolate-doom.cfg disjoint-namespace M_LoadDefaults precedence is exercised by test/bootstrap/config-precedence.test.ts at the launch lane test root rather than under test/save/.

reference_manifest_status.notes: Manifest alignment records the vanilla SAVEGAMESIZE=180224 (0x2c000) save buffer cap that src/save/vanillaLimits.ts mirrors as VANILLA_SAVEGAME_LIMIT_SIZE, the SAVESTRINGSIZE=24 description-string cap that src/save/saveHeader.ts mirrors as SAVEGAME_DESCRIPTION_SIZE, the MAXPLAYERS=4 player-array cardinality that src/save/coreSerialization.ts mirrors as SAVEGAME_PLAYER_COUNT and src/save/saveHeader.ts mirrors as SAVEGAME_PLAYER_COUNT, the MAXCEILINGS=30/MAXPLATS=30/MAXBUTTONS=16 active-thinker caps that src/save/specialSerialization.ts mirrors as SAVEGAME_SPECIAL_ACTIVE_CEILING_COUNT/ACTIVE_PLAT_COUNT/BUTTON_COUNT, the TICRATE=35 game-tic baseline that anchors leveltime serialization, and the canonical Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 d_main.c (M_LoadDefaults command-line wiring), doomdef.h (SAVESTRINGSIZE/MAXPLAYERS), g_game.c (G_DoSaveGame, G_DoLoadGame, SAVEGAMESIZE, SAVE_GAME_TERMINATOR), and p_saveg.c (P_ArchivePlayers, P_UnArchivePlayers, P_ArchiveWorld, P_UnArchiveWorld, P_ArchiveThinkers, P_UnArchiveThinkers, P_ArchiveSpecials, P_UnArchiveSpecials) source files that the src/save/ and src/bootstrap/config.ts modules model; this inventory does not embed WAD bytes, raw configuration file contents, or raw save bytes.

save_and_config_boundary_status.notes: src/save/ owns the savegame surface partitioned into save_layout (coreSerialization.ts) for the canonical SAVEGAME_*_SIZE byte-span constants and the readArchived/writeArchived players/mobjs/world primitives, save_specials (specialSerialization.ts) for the tc_ceiling..tc_endspecials thinker-class-tagged P_ArchiveSpecials/P_UnArchiveSpecials serializer, and save_envelope (saveHeader.ts, loadgame.ts, vanillaLimits.ts) for the savegame header writer/reader, the G_DoLoadGame top-level chain, and the SAVEGAMESIZE=0x2c000 cap with the canonical header→players→world→mobjs→specials→EOF section assembly. src/bootstrap/config.ts owns the config_loader group implementing the M_LoadDefaults disjoint default.cfg+chocolate-doom.cfg precedence with the -config and -extraconfig command-line override resolvers and the silent unknown-variable ignore behavior. Save modules accept SaveGameWorldLayout, SaveGameHeader, SaveGameMobj[], SaveGamePlayerArchive, SaveGameSpecialArchive, VanillaSaveGameSections records and starting-byte offsets through injected parameters; the config module accepts a CommandLine instance, ConfigDefinition arrays, and a configDirectory through injected parameters; each module is unit-tested without a live filesystem, WAD, or active game state.

implications: src/save/saveHeader.ts is the broadest export surface in the save lane (12 src/ importers and 15 test importers); reshaping the SaveGameHeader interface, the SAVEGAME_DESCRIPTION_SIZE=24/SAVEGAME_VERSION_CODE=109/SAVEGAME_VERSION_TEXT='version 109'/SAVEGAME_HEADER_SIZE constants, the SaveGamePlayerPresence player-tuple type, or the readSaveGameHeader/writeSaveGameHeader fixed-width parser/writer pair is a cross-lane breaking change that the launch, gameplay, save, ui (menus save-string editing), and demo lanes must absorb together; downstream Phase 12 follow-ups 12-011, 12-012, 12-020, and 12-021 depend on these exports staying stable across the inventory baseline.

src/save/loadgame.ts is the canonical bridge from a contiguous savegame byte buffer to the typed restored bundle: it walks header→players→world→mobjs→specials→SAVEGAME_EOF=0x1d in the canonical Doom section order via readSaveGameHeader/readArchivedPlayers/readArchivedWorld/readArchivedMobjs/readArchivedSpecials, and src/save/vanillaLimits.ts writeVanillaSaveGame mirrors the same order on the write side via writeArchivedPlayers/writeArchivedWorld/writeArchivedMobjs/writeArchivedSpecials concatenation followed by the trailing SAVEGAME_EOF=0x1d byte. Reordering or splitting any section breaks roundtrip parity against vanilla saves, and downstream Phase 12 gates 12-026 (compare-save-load-roundtrip-oracle) and 12-028 (gate-save-load-byte-parity) must keep this canonical order pinned to the Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 g_game.c sequence.

src/save/coreSerialization.ts SAVEGAME_MOBJ_SIZE=154, SAVEGAME_PLAYER_SIZE=280, SAVEGAME_PSPRITE_SIZE=16, SAVEGAME_SECTOR_SIZE=14, SAVEGAME_SIDE_SIZE=10, SAVEGAME_LINE_BASE_SIZE=6, SAVEGAME_MAPTHING_SIZE=10, SAVEGAME_TICCMD_SIZE=8 and SAVEGAME_ALIGNMENT=4 byte-span constants, src/save/specialSerialization.ts SAVEGAME_SPECIAL_DOOR_SIZE=40/FLOOR_SIZE=42/FLASH_SIZE=36/STROBE_SIZE=36/GLOW_SIZE=28/REFERENCE_SIZE=4 thinker spans, src/save/saveHeader.ts SAVEGAME_DESCRIPTION_SIZE=24/SAVEGAME_VERSION_SIZE=16/SAVEGAME_VERSION_CODE=109/SAVEGAME_LEVELTIME_SIZE=3 header layout, and src/save/vanillaLimits.ts VANILLA_SAVEGAME_LIMIT_SIZE=0x2c000 (180224 bytes) plus VANILLA_SAVEGAME_OVERRUN_ERROR='Savegame buffer overrun' are bit-exact mirrors of the Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 p_saveg.c, g_game.c, and doomdef.h on-disk savegame layout; downstream Phase 12 follow-ups 12-013 through 12-019, 12-022, and 12-025 must keep these byte spans, the vanilla SAVEGAMESIZE cap, and the I_Error overrun message pinned until a non-vanilla save format is introduced.

src/save/specialSerialization.ts SAVEGAME_SPECIAL_THINKER_CLASS_CEILING=0/DOOR=1/FLOOR=2/PLAT=3/FLASH=4/STROBE=5/GLOW=6/END=7 (tc_ceiling..tc_endspecials) thinker-class enumeration, the SAVEGAME_SPECIAL_ACTIVE_PLAT_COUNT=MAXPLATS=30/SAVEGAME_SPECIAL_ACTIVE_CEILING_COUNT=MAXCEILINGS=30/SAVEGAME_SPECIAL_BUTTON_COUNT=MAXBUTTONS=16 vanilla active-thinker caps from MAXCEILINGS/MAXPLATS in p_ceilng.c/p_plats.c and MAXBUTTONS in p_spec.c, and the SaveGameSpecialThinker discriminated union (door|floor|plat-reference|ceiling-reference|flash|strobe|glow) are direct mirrors of vanilla p_saveg.c P_ArchiveSpecials/P_UnArchiveSpecials class-byte-prefixed serialization; downstream Phase 12 follow-ups 12-015, 12-016, 12-017, 12-018, and the gate 12-028 must keep the class numbering and active-thinker caps pinned to the Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 defaults so that legacy savegames continue to load and round-trip without thinker-class skew.

src/bootstrap/config.ts implements the M_LoadDefaults two-file disjoint-namespace precedence (defaults → default.cfg → chocolate-doom.cfg) with the VANILLA_CONFIG_FILENAME='default.cfg' and EXTENDED_CONFIG_FILENAME='chocolate-doom.cfg' filename constants and the -config/-extraconfig command-line override resolvers; its 3 src/ importers and 1 test importer mean the launch lane (Phase 03) and the save/config lane (Phase 12) both depend on the loadDefaults async pipeline and the ConfigDefinition/ConfigLoadResult interfaces. Reshaping the ConfigValueType (float|integer|string) discriminator, the silent unknown-variable ignore behavior, or the -config/-extraconfig override priority is a cross-lane breaking change that the Phase 12 follow-ups 12-001, 12-002, 12-008, 12-009, and the gate 12-027 (gate-config-compatibility) must absorb together; the disjoint-namespace assumption (default.cfg and chocolate-doom.cfg never share variable names) must be preserved or roundtrip parity against the vanilla config writer breaks.

src/save/ and src/bootstrap/config.ts share a strict no-proprietary-bytes boundary: SAVEGAME_*_SIZE constants and config filename strings are derived from Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 source headers (doomdef.h, g_game.c, p_saveg.c, m_config.c) and the DoomWiki Savegame format documentation (catalog id S-043), but the inventory must never embed raw save bytes, raw default.cfg contents, or raw chocolate-doom.cfg contents. Phase 12 follow-ups 12-009 (isolate-tests-from-user-local-config) and 12-010 (define-save-directory-policy) extend this boundary at the test and runtime level, and Phase 02 oracle-capture follow-ups 02-007 (capture-default-cfg-baseline), 02-008 (capture-chocolate-doom-cfg-baseline), 02-015 (define-save-byte-capture-format), and 02-031 (capture-save-load-roundtrip-oracle) own the live evidence capture path.
